description_long: This object is a rectangular snack package with a predominantly white exterior and printed graphics. The front side displays the product name 'Loempia Kip Ham' in purple and orange text, along with an image of a golden-brown fried snack, likely a spring roll, placed on a blue-patterned plate. The packaging is made of thin cardboard or paperboard, shaped with angled sides and a shallow open top, typical for ready-to-eat or convenience foods. The back and sides are mostly plain white with minimal visible text or graphics. The overall size and lightweight construction suggest it is designed for single or double servings, suitable for quick consumption in urban environments.
description: A white rectangular snack package with purple and orange branding and an image of a fried spring roll on the front. The packaging is made of thin cardboard and is designed for ready-to-eat snacks.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile and slight taper of the package, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_1: The front view displays the 'Loempia Kip Ham' branding in purple and orange, along with a photo of a fried snack on a plate.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, shows the thin edge and a hint of the snack image wrapping around the side.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a plain white surface with no visible graphics or text, highlighting the simple construction.
attribute_brand_logo: The front face features a stylized 'Loempia' logo in purple script, located at the top left, with additional orange and purple text below. No other distinct brand logo is visible.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front text 'Kip Ham' and the image of a fried snack suggest a chicken and ham flavor.
